rationale: No new qualitative developments affecting Romania's security or economy this cycle; Iran deal optimism marginally positive for energy costs but unconfirmed.

top_events.title: Trump claims Iran deal near, markets surge
top_events.summary: Potential Iran deal and oil market reaction could marginally ease energy costs for Romania, but nothing structurally confirmed.

top_events.title: Israel strikes Gaza overnight
top_events.summary: Ongoing Gaza conflict; no direct Black Sea or Romanian security implication this cycle.

top_events.summary: Distant natural disaster with no relevance to Romanian daily life.
